calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronald Ripps appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court stated that it reviewed the petition and the supporting documents. Mr. Ripps stated that he has nothing to add. The Petition to Establish Fact of Death is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.
